description:
A conceptual map illustrating a coastal landscape with different land cover and water body types, potentially following a classification system. The map depicts a contiguous area of light green labelled "2.1.1 Arable irrigated and non-irrigated land". This land transitions into light blue areas labelled "8.3.1 Lagoons", representing inland coastal water bodies. Along the interface between the lagoons/land and the open sea, there are yellow features labelled "6.2.1. Beaches and Dunes", with arrows pointing from the label to specific yellow areas. The outermost water body is dark blue, labelled "8.4.2 Coastal waters".

A legend on the right clarifies the colour coding:
*   Light blue: Coastal lagoon
*   Yellow: Sand bank
*   Light green: Irrigated land
*   Dark blue: Sea and Ocean

The "Irrigated land" label in the legend appears to be a simplification of "2.1.1 Arable irrigated and non-irrigated land". The numerical prefixes likely refer to a hierarchical land cover classification scheme. No geographic area, scale, or date is specified.
